check_ins.content:
, March 23
Merged 4 Web Giving PRs: cents on giving history; strip non-digits from phone on payment form; recurring gift confirmation email aligned with Donation Receipt; re-applied WEB source on createOrUpdateGiveIntent (revert of revert).
Cluster: PR to speed up Saved Payment Method loading on web giving (parallelize some Stripe calls).
Opened 2 Web Giving polish PRs (hook for targeting styles; focus rings on buttons/links).
git-for-sql: PR to restrict access to ApollosProject org members.
A couple of PR reviews; a lot of Linear cleanup/questions.
Slack with Shahbano on Web Giving emails + notes on a Figma board for next week.
Tooling friction: Cursor / Claude account + API token setup.
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-cluster, git-for-sql
Linear done (among others): APO-7726, APO-7718, APO-7716, APO-7349

, March 24
Debugging: gross vs net fee settlement in prod/staging; manual ACH verification in staging/local (ahead of prod).
Helped Casey and Matt with Web Embeds.
PR review huddle with Dylan and Vincent (large set of reconciliation-related reverts/migrations reviewed).
Synced with Michael and Vincent on Admin seeds and Suggested Follows (suggestion PR submitted).
Merged: pass $0 application fee to Rock when STRIPE.FEE_SETTLEMENT is gross (apollos-cluster); style-targeting hook + focus rings (apollos-admin).
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-cluster

, March 25
Technical derisking: more statuses on Admin /transactions + matching cluster work; design shaping for surfacing v2 Web Embed in Admin.
Merged: dark color scheme on canvas select (apollos-admin); Suggested Follows refactor using people_merge_records (apollos-cluster).
In flight: transaction status filter; payment intent requires_action handling; first pass user-facing giving embed setup; embed version badge for CS clarity.
Reviews/tweaks with Michael and Vincent on SQL / Suggested Follows; reviewed SQL migration cleaning stale IDs from Suggested Follows config.
Chats with Jordan and Shahbano on manual ACH / CRDS testing; updated personal tracker for Linear replies.
Repos: apollos-admin, apollos-cluster, apollos-shovel

, March 26
Archived Recon Dashboard repo; shut down Vercel staging (no active config).
Crossroads: verified transactions for Karen.
Merged: feature-flagged manual ACH / microdeposit verification email (local/staging) so donors can self-verify; Vimeo support in Admin media URL validation.
Merged / advanced: Admin Web Embed version visibility (badge) + ongoing giving embed setup pass.
PR reviews (recurring charges press/hover; temporarily disable editing payment method on recurring giving).
Slack: Dylan (Setup Intents), Shahbano (giving emails); Linear follow-ups.
Linear: e.g. done APO-8013, APO-7758; created APO-8004 (bring back edit payment method on recurring giving on web).
Repo: apollos-admin

, March 27
504s in staging with Tyler and Vincent.
Playwright CI improvements for admin.
QA with Tyler; more test coverage on web auth routes (open PR).
Sync Dylan & Shahbano.
Cancel recurring donation email flow with Michael and Vincent (review on sending from Admin Stripe webhooks).
Linear replies across fee settlement (Rock), receipt copy, frequency UI, PushPay redirect, focus rings, saved PM load time, manage-giving URLs, etc.
Repo: apollos-admin
